risks.title: BREAKING: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 to win 2026 FIFA World Cup
risks.description:
Spain defeats Argentina 1-0 in extra time to win the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Ferran Torres scores the decisive goal, securing Spain’s second World Cup title.

Read More: https://punchng.com/breaking-spain-beat-argentina-1-0-to-win-2026-fifa-world-cup/
